title: Baseline Shift Caption
prompt:
Create a production-ready Baseline Shift Caption using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build an editorial caption whose three short clauses sit on a shared baseline until the reader selects one; the selected clause rises slightly, gains a coral index mark, and exposes a concise definition below. The effect should feel measured and typographic rather than like a carousel. Use a #F4F5F6 surround, white Bento panel, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F supporting copy. Coral is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or make selection depend on color alone.

Use three semantic buttons in a labelled group with aria-pressed, and use a polite live region for the selected definition. Click, Enter, and Space choose the same clause. Each target must be at least 44px high, preserve readable type, and show a visible 3px dark focus ring. Hover may lift a clause 2px over 180ms; press may compress it 1px over 90ms. Animate the baseline shift with a spring of stiffness 370 and damping 27, then crossfade the definition over 160ms. The selected state should have an index mark and text weight change even if animation is reduced. Use local React state only; no timers, random values, storage, remote assets, or network calls.

At 320px allow clauses to wrap in an intentional vertical rhythm without clipping. At wider sizes, keep the caption compact and centered. Maintain AA contrast, logical tab order, and clear accessible names. Prefer transform and opacity. Respect prefers-reduced-motion with an immediate baseline change or 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:

*/ .uiwiki-baseline{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;align-items:flex-end}.uiwiki-baseline button{min-height:44px;border:0;border-radius:8px;background:#fff;color:#111;font:900 22px system-ui;transition:transform 180ms ease}.uiwiki-baseline button[aria-pressed="true"]{transform:translateY(-7px);text-decoration:underline 3px #f97316}.uiwiki-baseline button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-baseline button{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [a,setA]=React.useState(0);const c=[['Observe','Notice the evidence before naming it.'],['Frame','Set a useful boundary.'],['Decide','Turn context into action.']];return

{c.map((x,i)=>setA(i)} animate={{y:a===i?-7:0}} style={{minHeight:38,border:0,borderRadius:7,background:'#fff',fontSize:20,fontWeight:900}}>{a===i&&0{i+1}}{x[0]})}

{c[a][1]}

}return ;})()
